summary: V1 production closure testing completed. All 6 changes verified successfully. Frontend-only testing as requested - backend was not modified.
passed_tests: Login flow with admin@sistemamaestro.com / admin123 works correctly
Registration form renders cleanly without icon overlaps - fields are clean text inputs with labels above
Google login button shows proper Google multicolor icon (SVG) with text 'Continuar con Google'
Logo is visibly larger: navbar=64px (large), auth pages=88px (xlarge), sidebar visible
Dashboard loads correctly for premium user showing stats (9 Projects, 1 Blueprint, Plan: Premium)
Opportunities page shows ALL 5 opportunities for premium/admin user
No locked cards visible for premium/admin user
No 'Desbloquear más' button visible for premium/admin user
Opportunities detail modal opens when clicking on opportunity card
No 'Made with Emergent' badge visible on any page (#emergent-badge hidden via CSS)
Footer shows affiliate links: Systeme.io and SistemaMaestroIA
Error messages appear in Spanish (wrong credentials shows 'Credenciales incorrectas')
All UI text is in Spanish throughout the app
Cookie banner displays correctly with 'Aceptar' button
critical_code_review_comments: Code changes verified: Empty catch blocks in Dashboard.js and AuthContext.js now properly handle errors
Array index keys replaced with stable IDs in ProjectDetail.js, Opportunities.js, Flow.js
Logo sizes correctly configured: small=40, default=52, large=64, xlarge=88
Google icon SVG component properly implemented with multicolor paths
Admin role check in Opportunities access logic working (canAccessAll = plan==='premium' || role==='admin')
context_for_next_testing_agent: V1 production closure complete. All 6 changes verified: (1) Empty catch blocks fixed, (2) Array index keys replaced with stable IDs, (3) Logo sizes increased, (4) Google login button has real multicolor SVG icon, (5) Registration/login forms cleaned up, (6) Admin role check in Opportunities working. Feature freeze in effect. Spanish language app fully functional.
